tasks.summary: service-bus-consumer page referenced but doesn't exist
tasks.details: ServiceBusConsumerWorker has <docs> tag pointing to messaging/transports/service-bus-consumer but this page doesn't exist. Content may be covered in transport-consumer.md but the path is wrong.

tasks.summary: Two work coordination pages — potential overlap
tasks.details: work-coordination.md and work-coordinator.md both cover work coordination. Need to verify they're clearly differentiated (one conceptual, one API reference?) or consolidate. Both have significant content.

tasks.summary: 77 undocumented public types in messaging/transport layer
tasks.details: Baseline found 77 undocumented types across messaging infrastructure: IWorkCoordinator, IWorkBatchCoordinator, IUnitOfWorkStrategy, WorkBatch, OutboxMessage, InboxMessage, MessageCompletion, MessageFailure, IMessageQueue, etc. Many are internal implementation types but key interfaces (IWorkCoordinator, IUnitOfWorkStrategy) should be documented for users who configure work coordination.

tasks.summary: Outbox topic architecture change may not be reflected
tasks.details: Memory note (project_audit_topic_architecture.md) indicates an 'outbox topic approach to eliminate circular DI'. Need to verify the outbox-pattern.md reflects the current architecture, especially around topic-based outbox publishing vs direct dispatch.

tasks.summary: Code samples across all 15 pages have auto-generated poor metadata
tasks.details: Same pattern as all previous sessions.

sectionSummary: The messaging section has 15 content pages. The most striking issue is that 6 pages have NO frontmatter at all (commands-events, failure-handling, idempotency-patterns, multi-instance-coordination, work-coordination, topic-filters). Additionally, 5 pages that do have frontmatter are missing codeReferences. There are 77 undocumented public types in the messaging/transport layer, though many may be internal. The outbox topic architecture change (from memory) needs verification. There's potential redundancy between work-coordination.md and work-coordinator.md. One broken code-docs link (service-bus-consumer page missing).
